tagline.en: The final batch of spring onions are ready!
tagline.da: Det sidste hold foraarsloeg er klar!

theme.hero_task: Pull the last spring onions for dinner

tasks.action: Harvest final spring onion batch from Bed D

prompt.en: The last spring onions of the year! Pull them for tonight's dinner.
prompt.da: De sidste foraarsloeg i aar! Traek dem til aftensmad.

tasks.action: Harvest tomatoes and peppers from Bed C

prompt.en: Pick all ripe tomatoes -- even slightly green ones will ripen on the windowsill!
prompt.da: Pluk alle modne tomater -- selv lidt groenne modner paa vindueskarmen!

prompt.en: September rain helps, but check anyway.
Still raspberries! The birds want them too -- pick early in the morning!
prompt.da: Stadig hindbaer! Fuglene vil ogsaa have dem -- pluk tidligt om morgenen!

tasks.action: Remove spent cucumber plant from Bed C trellis

prompt.en: The cucumber is done -- cut it free from the trellis and compost it.
prompt.da: Agurken er faerdig -- klip den fri fra espalieren og laeg den i kompost.

growth_events.event: Kale sweetening after first cool nights

prompt.en: The kale is actually getting SWEETER now! Cold nights make it taste better.
prompt.da: Groenkaalen bliver faktisk SOEDERE nu! Kolde naetter faar den til at smage bedre.

growth_events.event: Tomato production slowing but still ripening on the vine

prompt.en: The last tomatoes are ripening slowly -- enjoy every one!
prompt.da: De sidste tomater modner langsomt -- nyd hver eneste en!
